dbEquipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or lower you gain 5% Incoming Healing for 6 seconds. Teammates who are 25 or closer to you gain 5% Incoming Healing for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 17s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Depleted Attention
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your Stamina is under 25%, your Awareness is increased by 10,625.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Forte
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Forte is increased by 2,125 every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or less enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 10,625 Forte.

dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: +4% Power

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Forte
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with 1 enemy, your Forte is increased by 0.9% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 3 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 4.5% Forte.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Freezing Touch (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: +4% Power

dbEquipBonuses.name: Manticore's Mane Bite
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, the next enemy that attacks you takes damage equal to 50% of your max health (30 second cooldown). In PvP this damage is reduced to 10% of your max health. +4.5% Defense.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Circular Healing
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are healed in combat, gain 8% Outgoing Healing for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Vanguard's Assurance
dbEquipBonuses.description: You gain 6% Combat Advantage. When in combat with 2 or more enemies, you also gain 3.25% Power.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Graceful Harmony
dbEquipBonuses.description: You gain 1.2% Outgoing Healing for each player in your team. When your teammates are 25 or closer to you, their Forte is increased by 1.25%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Charged Fortitude
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your Stamina is above 75%, your Defense is increased by 5%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Divine Blessing (Cesser)
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your current Hit Points increases your Forte, up to a max of 4%. Currently: 4% Forte.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Circular Healing
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are healed in combat, gain 8% Outgoing Healing for 10 seconds. (20 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Brave Warden
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you are 25 or closer to your target, your Power is increased by 5%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Inner Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your Stamina is over 75%, your Power is increased by 14,475.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Avoidance
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain up to 14,475 Awareness based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health. Currently: 0 Awareness.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Assassin's Growth
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you critically strike an enemy with your Powers, you gain 14,475 Critical Severity for 10s. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Overwhelming Support
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, gain 13,150 Outgoing Healing. This bonus is divided by the total number of enemies you are in combat with.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Explosive Volley
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you damage an enemy with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to deal 100 magnitude damage in a 20 radius around your target. (5 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Graceful Harmony
dbEquipBonuses.description: Increase Outgoing Healing for each player in your team. When your teammates are 20 or closer to you, their Forte is increased by 1%.

dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: +4% Critical Strike
